full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 19.4 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 400 uL Dispase, and 200 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 5 mL of iPDS medium, and counted the cells.

Dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 5.52 E6

live: 3.56 E6

viability: 64.5 %

size: 8.1 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 4.55 E6

live: 3.5 E6

viability: 77 %

size: 8.6 um

Total cell count: 25.2 E6

Total volume: 5 mL

Overall # of cells in 5 mL was 25.2 E6.

I took 2 E6 cells (in 2 Eppendorf tubes) for flow cytometry staining, 5 E6 cells were seeded in 48-well plates for drug experiments, 6 E6 cells were used for long-term organoid seeding, and the rest (12E6) was frozen in StemCellBanker at -80.
